pr.title: Record: Aggressive SGD TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1124)

output.summary: After base training, they run 30-epoch, high-LR SGD TTT with every block unfrozen to amplify validation adaptation gains.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts all weights via SGD solely on validation data during evaluation.
techniques: High-LR (≈1.0) 30-epoch SGD TTT on fully unfrozen model
Score-first validation adaptation within eval budget
